description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean, straight lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure includes a flat roof and a central open courtyard or atrium visible from above, surrounded by a series of columns and railings. The front facade is characterized by large, horizontal windows and a wooden accent panel, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The side elevations are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and a minimalist style. The rear of the house showcases an open, colonnaded area, likely serving as a covered patio or veranda. Overall, the house exudes a sleek, urban feel suitable for upscale residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, large horizontal windows, and a central open courtyard surrounded by columns. The exterior is predominantly white with wooden accents and minimalistic detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing large horizontal windows and a wooden accent panel beneath a flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid white wall and a long, narrow window strip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting an open colonnaded area and the central courtyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid wall and minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: large horizontal windows with minimalistic, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door with a wooden accent panel, no visible steps, and a clean, minimalist overhang.
